title: Environment Snapshots
noProject: Select a project to view snapshots.

docker.label: Docker
docker.description: Generate a Dockerfile that recreates the toolchain and checks out the captured commit.

nix.label: Nix
nix.description: Generate a flake.nix shell with matching Node/Python/Git for reproducible entry.
